rationale: Cycle 2: Fix 3 HIGH bugs — missing biome display name (BUG-003), effect format mismatch silently rejecting all dict effects (BUG-004), and randi_range modulo bias (BUG-006). All 3 bugs fixed, reviewed for Bible v2.4 compliance, committed and pushed.
next_cycle_plan: Fix remaining HIGH bugs (BUG-005 transient instance, BUG-007 encapsulation, BUG-008 null ref). Then MEDIUM bugs (BUG-014 faction defaults, BUG-011 deterministic minigame). Then TEST-PLAYTEST-1 + TEST-AUDIT-1.
